name: Elefantino Frigorifero
lore:
Lore of Elefantino Frigorifero
                                    


Elefantino Frigorifero is a fridge fused with an elephant, ears and limbs in a fancy kitchen.
Has big ears.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Elefantino Frigorifero, Apum Batad Ta! El Elefantucci Frigoriferucci.
Translated (English)
Elefantino Frigorifero, Apum Batad Ta! El Elefantucci Frigoriferucci.
